nasb.text: Machir took a wife for Huppim and Shuppim, whose sister’s name was Maacah. And the name of the second was Zelophehad, and Zelophehad had daughters.

esv.text: And Machir took a wife for Huppim and for Shuppim. The name of his sister was Maacah. And the name of the second was Zelophehad, and Zelophehad had daughters.

cnv.text: 瑪吉娶了妻子，是戶品和書品的妹妹，名叫瑪迦。瑪拿西的次子名叫西羅非哈；西羅非哈只有幾個女兒。

ccb.text: 玛吉娶了户品和书品的妹妹玛迦。玛拿西的次子名叫西罗非哈，西罗非哈只有几个女儿。
